parameters.name: q
parameters.value: BTC trading strategy backtesting 2025 Sharpe ratio quantitative

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO external_research (topic, source_url, key_finding, hypothesis, created_at)
SELECT 
  d->>'topic',
  d->>'source_url',
  d->>'key_finding',
  d->>'hypothesis',
  NOW()
FROM json_array_elements('{{ $json.ideas }}'::json) AS d
ON CONFLICT (topic, hypothesis) DO NOTHING
